articles.title_en: Putin sent greetings to participants of the Fast and Furious forum
articles.lead_en: The President noted that Russia needs well-educated and energetic people who can work in a team
articles.lead_raw: Президент отметил, что России нужны хорошо образованные и энергичные люди, умеющие работать в команде

articles.title_en: Analysts announced an increase in spending by Russians on new passenger cars by 37.5%
articles.lead_en: According to a study by Gazprombank Autoleasing and the analytical agency Autostat, expenses jumped to 395.5 billion rubles
articles.title_raw: Аналитики заявили о росте трат россиян на новые легковые машины на 37,5%
articles.lead_raw: По данным исследования компании "Газпромбанк автолизинг" и аналитического агентства "Автостат", расходы подскочили до 395,5 млрд рублей

articles.title_en: Miroshnik: the candidate for prime minister of Ukraine knows how to “effectively master” Western financial assistance
articles.lead_en: This is probably why Vladimir Zelensky needs the head of Naftogaz, Sergei Koretsky, noted the Ambassador at Large of the Russian Foreign Ministry
articles.title_raw: Мирошник: кандидат в премьеры Украины умеет "эффективно осваивать" западную финпомощь
articles.lead_raw: Вероятно, именно поэтому глава компании "Нафтогаз" Сергей Корецкий нужен Владимиру Зеленскому, отметил посол по особым поручениям МИД России

articles.title_en: Russia Says Ukraine Struck Tanker in Sea of Azov
articles.lead_en: Authorities said there was no risk of an oil spill because the vessel was empty.
articles.title_raw: Russia Says Ukraine Struck Tanker in Sea of Azov
articles.lead_raw: Authorities said there was no risk of an oil spill because the vessel was empty.

articles.title_en: The Russian Armed Forces hit energy and transport facilities of the Armed Forces of Ukraine within 24 hours
articles.lead_en: Enemy temporary deployment points in 158 districts were also hit.

articles.title_en: TVEL is ready to meet the Russian market's need for power banks for electric vehicles
articles.lead_en: Production volumes will depend on the growth of the fleet of electric vehicles and on the demand for solutions for open parking lots where such stations can be installed, said Alexander Bukhvalov, director of the Electric Mobility business area of ​​the Fuel Division of Rosatom
articles.title_raw: ТВЭЛ готов обеспечить потребность российского рынка в пауэрбанках для электромобилей
articles.lead_raw: Объемы производства будут зависеть от роста парка электромобилей и от спроса на решения для открытых парковок, где можно устанавливать такие станции, сообщил директор бизнес-направления "Электромобильность" Топливного дивизиона Росатома Александр Бухвалов

articles.title_en: TVEL intends to provide electric drives to all manufacturers of electric cars in the Russian Federation
articles.lead_en: Alexander Bukhvalov, director of the “Electromobility” business direction of Rosatom’s fuel division, said that this component was created in collaboration with eastern partners
